name: ICD Coding — Liver Abscess + Streptococcal Infection
description: Level 1 — MIMIC hadm 26321862 — 2 diagnoses with etiology pairing
prompt: Patient: Male, 43 years old. ER admission. Chief complaint: right upper quadrant pain and high fever for 5 days. Physical exam: hepatomegaly, right hypochondrial tenderness. Ultrasound: hypoechoic lesion right hepatic lobe consistent with abscess. Labs: hemoglobin 8.4 g/dL, albumin 2.8 g/dL, INR 1.6, sodium 130 mEq/L. Blood culture: Streptococcus species. Treatment: Ceftriaxone, Ampicillin-Sulbactam, Metronidazole. Discharged home after 8 days. Diagnoses: Liver abscess, Streptococcal infection. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).

codes.description: Unspecified streptococcus as the cause of diseases classified elsewhere
